title: Luminarc Empilable Glass Bowl - 1 oz - 6 pack
features: Stackable for simple and easy storage
Clear to match any commercial or home kitchen
Small size for condiments, sauces, spices, and more
description: These glass bowls are ideal for holding premeasured ingredients for mise en place or for serving condiments, dips, and sauces. Pack of 6 Size: 1 oz Capacity: 1 ounce/35 millilitres Dimensions: 2¼"Dia × 1"D Materials: Tempered glass Care: Dishwasher safe Product of France
